new_terms.suggested_translation: 台积电亚利桑那州工厂
new_terms.context: Refers to TSMC's fab located in Arizona, USA.
Crucial distinction: 'token' here means 'symbolic' or 'minimal', not an LLM token. Must not be translated using the existing glossary term 'token'.
Derived from the existing term 'ramp' (产能爬坡), referring to the speed at which production scales up.
